## Practical Skill Entry Points

1. Generate product requirements: use Product PRD Builder + sce-prd-generator.
2. Create architecture artifacts: use sce-adr-writer and sce-ubb-writer.
3. Build review-ready code outputs: use sce-code-review-standards before merge.
4. Build CI/CD workflows: use sce-build-workflow-generator, sce-check-workflow-generator, and sce-deploy-workflow-generator.
5. Run security and compliance checks: use the security and compliance skill groups.

## Notes

- This playbook was generated from local files under .github/agents and .github/skills.
- Unknown phase-agent mappings are intentionally marked as TBD instead of inferred.
